prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科/物理类最低位次约17797→36261→28052→27214→33569，整体波动较大；2022年因省控线下降等因素位次大幅后移至36261，2023-2024年有所回升，2025年再次后移至33569，近3年累计后移约5500名；2025年基准约33569名；该校在河南省理科/物理类招生计划2021年18人、2022年21人、2023年25人、2024年29人、2025年29人，呈持续扩招趋势；2026年计划40人，较2025年增加11人（扩招约38%），计划增幅显著，按供需弹性模型推算竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华南师范大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第79名，近年排名稳定在75-80区间，属全国中上水平；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理类舆情，无重大负面事件；抖音热度排名第70（一般），短视频曝光量中等；近年无投档断档记录，报考心理预期平稳；心理学A+（全国顶尖）、马克思主义理论A、教育学A-、体育学A-；师范类学科实力突出，对有志于教育行业的考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业社会热度高热推荐，计算机类仍为推荐但热度明显降温，师范/教育类分化观望；河南省2026年高考总人数约120万，较2025年大幅增长约32%，物理类考生估算约73.4万，竞争基数显著扩大；华南师范大学位于广东省广州市，属一线城市，对河南考生跨省报考有一定地域吸引力；该校在河南招生计划占比较小，属省外优质生源竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动较大且2025年基准偏后、2026年招生计划大幅扩招（+38%）带来的竞争加剧效应、河南省考生总数显著增长（约+32%）导致整体竞争环境趋紧，以及学校层次稳定、声誉中性、专业热度分化等因素，考虑考生规模扩大和师范类热度小幅降温的交互影响，预测2026年理科/物理类最低位次约41406名，区间40906-41906名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 17797 → 36261 → 28052 → 27214 → 33569, showing significant fluctuations; in 2022, due to factors such as a decrease in the provincial control line, the ranking dropped significantly to 36261, rebounded in 2023-2024, and dropped again to 33569 in 2025, with a cumulative decline of about 5500 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 33569; the university's enrollment plan in Henan Province for science/physics category was 18 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 25 in 2023, 29 in 2024, and 29 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 40, an increase of 11 (about 38%) compared to 2025, with a significant increase in plan, and according to the supply-demand elasticity model, competition is expected to intensify.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking in 2026 is approximately 79th, with stable rankings in the 75-80 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving university management-related public opinion, with no major negative events; Douyin popularity ranking is 70th (average), with moderate short video exposure; no record of enrollment gaps in recent years, with stable expectations for application; Psychology A+ (top in the country), Marxist Theory A, Education A-, Physical Education A-; strong in teacher-training disciplines, with sustained appeal to students aspiring to the education industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic information/communication majors are highly recommended, computer majors are still recommended but with significantly cooled popularity, teacher-training/education majors are differentiated and wait-and-see; the total number of Henan Province college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is about 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025, with an estimated 734,000 physics category candidates, significantly expanding the competition base; South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou City, Guangdong Province, a first-tier city, with some regional appeal for Henan candidates applying across provinces; the university's enrollment plan in Henan accounts for a small proportion, belonging to competition for high-quality students from outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the large fluctuations in historical rankings and the relatively backward baseline in 2025, the intensified competition effect from the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+38%), the tightening of the overall competitive environment due to the significant increase in the total number of Henan candidates (about +32%), as well as factors such as stable university level, neutral reputation, and differentiated major popularity, and taking into account the interactive effects of the expansion of the candidate pool and a slight cooling of teacher-training popularity, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for science/physics category in 2026 will be approximately 41406, with a range of 40906-41906.

For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main force, Tier 1 for sprinting, and Tier 3 for safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<40906), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular engineering majors such as Network Engineering and Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering; for rankings close to the upper limit of the range (>41906), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors and pay attention to the new majors in 2026 such as Economics and Information Management and Information Systems.
